use_cases: Displaying feature highlights on a SaaS landing page
Creating organized content sections in product documentation
Building card-based layouts for product or service listings
Presenting information in scannable content blocks
Structuring dashboard widgets and data displays
ai_summary: A set of reusable Card component primitives (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) following the Shadcn UI pattern. These composable components provide a clean, minimalist card layout with proper typography spacing, borders, and shadows. Designed as building blocks for feature sections and content displays across various landing pages and application interfaces.
